sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Adang thu teng ka um ngamkei,
zeisu a minbek ka um thei.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A hong hehpihna ka muang ding,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A thuciam nate A ma si,
Tuipi kanlai ka muang ding hi,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Pengkul aw tawh a pai ciangin,
Ama mai - ah ka ding nuam hi,
A hong siangtho sak khit ciangin
